ddls:
CREATE TABLE "franchise_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "audit_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the audit */,
  "corp_name" TEXT /* Name of the corporate entity */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the client (franchise location) */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client (franchise location) */,
  "yl_status" TEXT /* Status of the YL (e.g., LIVE, DOWN) */,
  "input_url" TEXT /* Input URL for the audit */,
  "final_url" TEXT /* Final URL after redirection */,
  "initial_status_code" INTEGER /* Initial HTTP status code */,
  "final_status_code" INTEGER /* Final HTTP status code */,
  "final_url_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the final URL */,
  "final_url_ns" TEXT /* Nameserver of the final URL */,
  "ppc_product" TEXT /* PPC product used */,
  "ppc_status" TEXT /* Status of the PPC (e.g., PPC Not Found) */,
  "session_tracking_code" TEXT /* Session tracking code */,
  "web_using_ssl" INTEGER /* Indicates if the website is using SSL */,
  "can_ssl_be_installed" INTEGER /* Indicates if SSL can be installed */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit (e.g., Regular, Manual, Scheduled) */,
  "audit_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the audit */,
  "audit_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the audit in seconds */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the audit failed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the audit (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_franchise_audits_initial_status_code FOREIGN KEY ("initial_status_code") REFERENCES status_codes ("status_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_franchise_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_franchise_audits_final_status_code FOREIGN KEY ("final_status_code") REFERENCES status_codes ("status_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_franchise_audits_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client (franchise location) */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client (franchise location) */,
  "corp_name" TEXT /* Name of the corporate entity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the franchise */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the franchise */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Main contact phone number for the franchise location */,
  "business_hours" TEXT /* Business hours of the franchise location */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the franchise's website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the franchise's social media profiles */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the client record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clients_location FOREIGN KEY ("location") REFERENCES locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_tracking_numbers" (
  "ctn_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call tracking number entry */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client (franchise location) */,
  "desktop_unpaid_ctn" TEXT /* Desktop unpaid call tracking number */,
  "mobile_unpaid_ctn" TEXT /* Mobile unpaid call tracking number */,
  "desktop_paid_ctn" TEXT /* Desktop paid call tracking number */,
  "mobile_paid_ctn" TEXT /* Mobile paid call tracking number */,
  "db_unpaid_ctn" TEXT /* Database unpaid call tracking number */,
  "db_paid_ctn" TEXT /* Database paid call tracking number */,
  "analysis_desktop_unpaid_ctn" TEXT /* Analysis of the desktop unpaid call tracking number */,
  "analysis_mobile_unpaid_ctn" TEXT /* Analysis of the mobile unpaid call tracking number */,
  "analysis_desktop_paid_ctn" TEXT /* Analysis of the desktop paid call tracking number */,
  "analysis_mobile_paid_ctn" TEXT /* Analysis of the mobile paid call tracking number */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the call tracking number is active */,
  "last_call_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last call received */,
  "call_volume" INTEGER /* Number of calls received in the last audit period */,
  "call_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of calls in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ctn_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_call_tracking_numbers_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ppc_advertising" (
  "ppc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PPC entry */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client (franchise location) */,
  "ppc_product" TEXT /* PPC product used */,
  "ppc_status" TEXT /* Status of the PPC (e.g., PPC Not Found) */,
  "session_tracking_code" TEXT /* Session tracking code */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Monthly budget for PPC advertising */,
  "impressions" INTEGER /* Number of impressions in the last audit period */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks in the last audit period */,
  "ctr" TEXT /* Click-through rate (CTR) in percentage */,
  "conversion_rate" TEXT /* Conversion rate in percentage */,
  "cost_per_click" TEXT /* Cost per click (CPC) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ppc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ppc_advertising_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ssl_security" (
  "ssl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SSL entry */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client (franchise location) */,
  "web_using_ssl" INTEGER /* Indicates if the website is using SSL */,
  "can_ssl_be_installed" INTEGER /* Indicates if SSL can be installed */,
  "ssl_status" TEXT /* SSL status (e.g., YL SSL Status) */,
  "certificate_issuer" TEXT /* Issuer of the SSL certificate */,
  "certificate_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the SSL certificate */,
  "last_check_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last SSL check */,
  "security_score" INTEGER /* Security score based on SSL configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ssl_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ssl_security_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., franchise manager, marketing, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., Active, Inactive, Pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client (franchise location) being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "status_codes" (
  "status_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status code */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* HTTP status code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status code */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the status code (e.g., Informational, Success, Redirection, Client Error, Server Error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)
